title: 裏路地アドベンチャー

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond and I are on our way home from
a day out, when...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hm?! Oh my! What's this?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I've made a major discovery! There's a
side street over there!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Wow! I never noticed it before! I wonder what's
down there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I even have the chance to stop her,
Satono Diamond runs off down the street...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. This place feels kind of ominous, like a
ghost could just pop out of nowhere...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
BOO!
You mean like that?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh, Jordan! Hello! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I didn't scare you even a little? Omg, I must look
so cringe!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What're you up to anyway?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I was curious about this street, so I thought I'd go
on a little adventure and see where it takes me.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
The scenery around here is so unusual—it's like a
different world... Hehe. My heart won't stop
pounding. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Say less. Wanna check it out together then? I'll
show you all the spots that really slap!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, and don't get shook by the humungo dog at
this house. It barks nonstop the second you make
eye contact!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Sounds like a very lively doggy! I wonder what it
looks like...

text_block_list.name: Large Dog
text_block_list.text: Woof, woof! Woof!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Wow, you're right! Hehe. It's so cute!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Looks like you're having fun! Wanna see which
shops are really lit?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Certainly. That sounds fun.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh? That road over there looks even more
foreboding.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hol' up! You really don't wanna go over there!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
It's uh... kind of a hangout for some pretty sketch
types...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
They've never really messed with me, but that's
no reason to go jumping in there either.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Let's go this way inste—

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh nooo! This is low key bad! Satono?! Where are
you?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Ah, you must be a so-called delinquent, right?
I've seen people like you in TV shows.

text_block_list.name: Delinquent Girl
text_block_list.text: Huh? The heck you just say?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh, forgive me. My name is Satono Diamond.
There's something I'd really like to ask you.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I really like stories about delinquents sheltering
wet puppies from the rain. Have you ever had an
experience like that?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: W-w-wait, Satono! Just stop talking!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Don't mind her! We're just gonna dip!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wait, I—
choice_data_list: Let's hurry and get you home!
You should apologize for bothering her.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: O-okay...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: We'll be leaving now. Do have a pleasant day. ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm so disappointed my discussion with that
delinquent had to be cut short...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Are you okay?! How were you not shook by that
situation?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
What was there to be afraid of? From what I've
seen on TV, delinquents are kind-hearted people
who take in lost puppies. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: You're killing me here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond already seems disappointed, so
I refrain from scolding her.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It was rude of me to question you so suddenly...
Please accept my apology.

text_block_list.name: Delinquent Girl
text_block_list.text:
Tch. I ain't interested in starting something with
you stuffy types. Just watch yourself next time.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for understanding! I guess it's true that
delinquents stand firm for what they believe in!

text_block_list.name: Delinquent Girl
text_block_list.text:
Oh? You seem to actually know what's up, fancy
pants.
Heh. Wanna hit a cafe?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh, that sounds exquisite! I'd love to! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Seriously?! That Satono sure is built different!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Satono Diamond listens to the
delinquent's anecdotes, eyes lit up with wonder.
